# AI Companies Watchlist

This file defines the top 10 AI companies analyzed daily by the `ai-analyst` custom agent.

**Last updated:** 2026-05-24

## Companies

| Rank | Ticker | Company | Sector | Notes |
|------|--------|---------|--------|-------|
| 1 | NVDA | NVIDIA | Semiconductors (AI Chips) | Dominant in GPU market for AI training & inference |
| 2 | TSLA | Tesla | Automotive | AI autonomy, energy storage; Leaderboard leader |
| 3 | AVGO | Broadcom | Semiconductors | Data center interconnect for AI |
| 4 | MRVL | Marvell Technology | Semiconductors | AI chip acceleration |
| 5 | SMCI | Super Micro Computer | Hardware | AI server infrastructure |
| 6 | ARM | ARM Holdings | Semiconductors (Design) | Mobile & edge AI |
| 7 | PLTR | Palantir Technologies | Software | Enterprise AI analytics |
| 8 | SNPS | Synopsys | Software | AI chip design tools |
| 9 | CDNS | Cadence Design | Software | AI-driven EDA (chip design) |
| 10 | DDOG | Datadog | Software | AI monitoring & observability |

## Customization

To modify this list:
1. Edit the table above (add/remove rows, reorder ranks)
2. Save the file
3. Run `ai-analyst` agent on your next analysis (it will auto-load the updated list)

Do not change ticker symbols once a report is filed for a company. Create a new entry if adding a company.
